title: Cross-dataset meta-analysis (where valid)
context: A cross-dataset meta-analysis is delivered only where statistically valid; a reasoned decision NOT to meta-analyze is an acceptable, honest outcome (PLAN §8 M2). No over-claiming. Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Perform a cross-dataset meta-analysis where statistically valid, or document a reasoned decision not to, with explicit limitations.
acceptanceCriteria: Meta-analysis is performed only where validity conditions are met; otherwise a reasoned decision not to meta-analyze is documented.
Heterogeneity and confounding are quantified and reported.
Results framed as research-only with explicit limitations; provenance complete.
output: output/meta-analysis.md (cross-dataset meta-analysis where valid, or reasoned decision not to).
